ohtani.title: Tim Tawa's home run sparks D-backs' 9-3 win
ohtani.blurb: Tim Tawa belts a two-run home run and Gabriel Moreno knocks in two runs to push the D-backs to a 9-3 win over the Dodgers

imanaga.title: Greene, De La Cruz propel Reds to 4-0 victory
imanaga.blurb: A dozen strikeouts from Hunter Greene, and a two-hit day for Elly De La Cruz lead the Reds to a 4-0 shutout win over the Cubs

suzuki.title: Greene, De La Cruz propel Reds to 4-0 victory
suzuki.blurb: A dozen strikeouts from Hunter Greene, and a two-hit day for Elly De La Cruz lead the Reds to a 4-0 shutout win over the Cubs

yoshida.title: Seigler, Abreu crush homers in Red Sox's win
yoshida.blurb: Anthony Seigler and Wilyer Abreu crush home runs in the Red Sox's 6-2 win over the Mets

okamoto.title: Kazuma Okamoto's go-ahead homer powers Blue Jays' win
okamoto.blurb: Kazuma Okamoto hits go-ahead three-run homer and Vladimir Guerrero Jr. hits a game-tying RBI single in the Blue Jays' 5-3 winover the Padres

murakami.title: Tristan Peters' historic night leads White Sox in win
murakami.blurb: Tristan Peters completes his first career cycle to power the White Sox offense in a 14-1 win over the Athletics

matsui.title: Merrill Kelly's strong start leads D-backs in win
matsui.blurb: Merrill Kelly strikes out six in seven innings to power the D-backs' 3-1 win over the Padres
